name: integrate
goal: Wire store and handlers into the service entry point. Write main.go at the output root (github.com/cornjacket/ai-builder/sandbox/user-service-output). Initialise a store.Store, pass it to handlers.NewHandler, and start an http.Server listening on :8080. Write go.mod with module path github.com/cornjacket/ai-builder/sandbox/user-service-output and Go 1.22 (minimum needed for enhanced ServeMux routing). End-to-end acceptance criteria: (1) POST /users with valid JSON body returns 201 and a JSON user object with a non-empty id field; (2) GET /users/{id} with the returned id returns 200 and the same user; (3) GET /users/{nonexistent-id} returns 404; (4) PUT /users/{id} with updated fields returns 200 with updated values; (5) DELETE /users/{id} returns 204; (6) GET /users/{id} after deletion returns 404; (7) server listens on port 8080.
